runs.short_explanation: SafeCore blocked the user task before it could widen beyond the narrow safe connector boundary. Connector status: BLOCKED.
runs.why_blocked: Safe HTTP example only allows explicitly trusted local hosts.
operator_checks: Review destination allowlist and method restrictions before retry.
Validate destination ownership and data classification.
runs.next_step: Adjust the request so it stays inside the allowed connector boundary or choose a safer action.

runs.name: blocked_unsafe_status_method
